Craft with care

Páni Elegáni is your quiet retreat. Unwind and leave with renewed confidence.

Book an appointment

Craftsmanship with care and attention to detail

Welcome to PÁNI ELEGÁNI – a barber shop where we take care of your look with attention to detail and a relaxed atmosphere. We offer classic men’s haircuts, beard grooming, straight‑razor shaves and moustache care.

Our barbers are experienced and we want you to leave happy. A pleasant setting, quality products and time devoted just to you.

Great value

Quality services at an unbeatable price.

Quick service

Outstanding service in just a few minutes.

PE

Páni Elegáni

”

I think the most important thing a man can have – besides talent, of course – is his barber.

Born from a love of the craft

PÁNI ELEGÁNI were born from a love of the craft and traditional barber culture. We wanted a place where men can unwind and enjoy care that is all too rare today.

Since opening, we have aimed to keep a high standard of service and build a loyal community of clients who love coming back.

What we offer

Service pricing

  • Men's haircut Clipper and scissor cut, hair wash, styling 1 hour
    20 €
  • Buzz cut Buzz cut with razor or shaver, wash with scalp scrub and serum 30 minutes
    13 €
  • Kids' haircut (up to 13) Classic clipper and scissor cut, hair wash, styling 35 minutes
    13 €
  • Kids' haircut PRO (up to 13) FADE clipper and scissor cut, hair wash, styling 55 minutes
    16 €
  • Senior haircut (60+) Clipper and scissor cut, hair wash, styling 35–50 minutes
    14 €
  • Beard trim Full beard shaping, wash, styling 30 minutes
    14 €
  • Clean shave – Hot Towel Full beard Hot Towel service, steam, wash 40 minutes
    15 €
  • Facial cleansing Deep cleansing with ultrasonic spatula, peel, serum, face mask, relaxing face and head massage 1 hour
    23 €
  • Head massage Head massage – wet during wash or dry with oil before styling 15 minutes
    7 €
  • Ear and nose waxing Ear and nose waxing with hot wax
    3 €
  • Fresh package Haircut, wash, styling, full beard trim and wash, massage, styling, drink 1 h 30 min
    28 €
  • Beard trim and buzz cut Full beard trim, wash, styling, buzz cut, wash with scrub, scalp care, head massage 1 hour
    22 €
  • Gentlemen's package Haircut, wash, styling, clean shave, deep facial cleanse, peel, face mask, ear and nose waxing, brow tidy, head and face massage, drink 2 hours
    48 €
  • Gentlemen's package Plus Haircut, wash, styling, full Hot Towel beard, deep facial cleanse, face mask, peel, ear and nose waxing, brow tidy, head and face massage, drink 2 h 30 min
    58 €

Prices valid from 1 Feb 2026. Please confirm current pricing when booking.

Book an appointment

Client stories

Reviews

  • ★★★★★

    "Páni Elegáni is unlike anything I’ve experienced before—I found it by chance and since then I trust no one else with my haircut. It combines comfort with results. Lovely, fragrant space, always a smile, a communicative barber with a professional and human approach. She advises not only on the right cut but also on hair and skin care. I’m happy to go back with my kids and always leave satisfied and feeling fresh."

    Patrik a year ago
  • ★★★★★

    "Monika’s skill with scissors is extraordinary and I always leave with a stylish cut that matches my vibe. Monika is not only a great barber but also great company. Highly recommend!"

    Lukáš a year ago
  • ★★★★★

    "I always leave Páni Elegáni more than satisfied! You can feel Monika’s real passion for the craft and she nails every detail. I warmly recommend this barbershop to anyone looking for top‑tier service and exceptional care."

    Lukas a year ago
  • ★★★★★

    "I come regularly with my son and he’s very happy—he looks forward to haircuts, which used to be hard. Great approach, willingness, skill—top barber. Fully recommend."

    Dana a year ago
  • ★★★★★

    "After one older lady who cut my hair until military service, this is the best thing I’ve had in 23 years… hats off."

    botkes 4 months ago
All reviews on Google
Páni Elegáni

Traditional barbering for the modern man. Where craft meets elegance and style.
